name: disk-write-test
description: Writes 5GB to the task workdir (/tmp inside container → /var/funnel-work on host). Used to verify Cinder disk is used (not root /dev/sda1) and that the disk autoscaler is tracking usage correctly.

command: echo '[disk-write-test] Writing 5GB to /tmp/bigfile...' && dd if=/dev/zero of=/tmp/bigfile bs=1M count=5120 && echo '[disk-write-test] Write done.' && df -h /tmp && sleep 30 && echo '[disk-write-test] Removing file...' && rm /tmp/bigfile && echo '[disk-write-test] Done.'
